title: Xenoecoengineering Financial Principles
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Xenoecoengineering Financial Principles''' was the name of a course on [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]]. [[Joram Kithe]] attended it prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Behind the scenes==
Kithe spoke of the course as being located on "[[Muun/Legends|Muun]]." Kithe most likely misspoke, or else used a nickname for the planet.

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|65|The Pengalan Tradeoff|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}

[[Category:Educational courses and lectures]]
